model.summary: Show or switch the active model

permissions.summary: Show or switch the active permission mode

cost.summary: Show cumulative token usage for this session

resume.summary: Load a saved session into the REPL

config.summary: Inspect Elai config files or merged sections

memory.summary: Inspect loaded Elai instruction memory files

init.summary: Create a starter ELAI.md for this repo

diff.summary: Show git diff for current workspace changes

version.summary: Show CLI version and build information

update.summary: Check for and install the latest Elai Code release

bughunter.summary: Inspect the codebase for likely bugs

branch.summary: List, create, or switch git branches

worktree.summary: List, add, remove, or prune git worktrees

commit.summary: Generate a commit message and create a git commit

commit-push-pr.summary: Commit workspace changes, push the branch, and open a PR

pr.summary: Draft or create a pull request from the conversation

issue.summary: Draft or create a GitHub issue from the conversation

ultraplan.summary: Run a deep planning prompt with multi-step reasoning

teleport.summary: Jump to a file or symbol by searching the workspace

debug-tool-call.summary: Replay the last tool call with debug details

export.summary: Export the current conversation to a file

session.summary: List or switch managed local sessions

tools.summary: Inspect tool selection for the current session

dream.summary: Compress old memory entries into a summary

stats.summary: Show token usage and cost statistics

verify.summary: Verify codebase files against memory entries

locale.summary: Show or switch the interface language
